items.title: Tennessee football recruiting: 2027 Five-star RB David Gabriel Georges commits to Volunteers

items.title: Liverpool confident of signing Barcola - Thursday's gossip
items.summary: Alex Scott favours a move to Arsenal, Bruno Fernandes is ready to commit his future to Manchester United, Liverpool are confident they will sign Bradley Barcola, plus more.
